ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Continued To Mar-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Giovanni Brandolino appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Brandolino stated that he e-filed the inventory and appraisal ("I & A"), but he was told that the actual document is needed, that he noticed a mistake and that he sent it back to the referee. Mr. Brandolino also stated that he will overnight it and that the I & A shows $351,000.00. Status on filing of the final inventory and appraisal is continued to March 7, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court reminded Mr. Brandolino of the October 24, 2023 hearing on status on close of estate.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Giovanni G. Brandolino, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and the petitioner discuss the discrepancy in signature dates in the decedent's will and the date of notarization. Petitioner provides testimony regarding the preceding and advises that he was not present when the decedent signed the will. The court confirms with petitioner that he has no experience acting as a fiduciary and discusses with him regarding his next steps if he were to be appointed and advises him that the court is not inclined to appoint him in pro per with no bond, as the property is all personal property. Petitioner advises that he is working with a paralegal.
The court confirms that there are no objections. Therefore, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Dec-01-2021 is admitted to probate. Giovanni Gaval Brandolino is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $260,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing the Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Feb-07-2023 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-24-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed before Oct-24-2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
